scripts.template:help: node -e "console.log('Template System Commands:'); console.log('  npm run new:session          - Create new session from template'); console.log('  npm run template:generate    - Alias for new:session'); console.log('  npm run template:validate    - Validate template files'); console.log('  npm run template:list        - List available sessions'); console.log('  npm run scripts:update       - Update package.json scripts'); console.log('  npm run workflow:setup       - Complete workflow setup'); console.log('  npm run workflow:dev         - Start development workflow');"
scripts.dev:all: npm run template:list && echo 'Use dev:<session-number> to start a specific session'
scripts.scripts:auto: npm run scripts:update && echo 'Session scripts updated automatically'
scripts.workflow:new: npm run new:session && npm run scripts:update && echo 'New session created and scripts updated'
scripts.workflow:help: node -e "console.log('Template System Commands:'); console.log('  npm run new:session          - Create new session from template'); console.log('  npm run template:generate    - Alias for new:session'); console.log('  npm run template:validate    - Validate template files'); console.log('  npm run template:list        - List available sessions'); console.log('  npm run scripts:update       - Update package.json scripts'); console.log('  npm run workflow:setup       - Complete workflow setup'); console.log('  npm run workflow:dev         - Start development workflow'); console.log(''); console.log('Development Commands:'); console.log('  npm run dev:<XX>             - Start development server for session XX'); console.log('  npm run build:<XX>           - Build session XX for production'); console.log('  npm run dev:reload           - Start with live reload on port 3333'); console.log('  npm run dev:network          - Start with network access'); console.log('  npm run workflow:new         - Create new session and update scripts'); console.log('  npm run workflow:setup       - Complete workflow setup'); console.log('  npm run workflow:validate    - Validate development environment'); console.log('  npm run workflow:status      - Show workflow status');"
